stop.prompt: Review the agent session context in $ARGUMENTS. If the user fixed the same type of bug, performed the same task, or you made the same kind of correction more than once during this session, output JSON with a single 'followup_message' field suggesting in 1-2 sentences that they create a Cursor rule or skill to automate the pattern. Be specific about what the pattern was. If there is no clear recurring pattern, output {}.
